list.name: SLO Breach

description: Multi-window multi-burn-rate SLO tracking implementing Google's SRE approach across the full LGTM+Pyroscope stack.

panels.description: Current SLO compliance for Mimir write (push) path. Measures the ratio of requests completing within 0.5s latency SLO over a 30-day rolling window.

targets.expr: sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.5", route=~"/api/v1/push|api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30d])) / sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/api/v1/push|api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30d]))

panels.title: Mimir Write SLO

panels.description: Current SLO compliance for Mimir read (query) path. Measures the ratio of requests completing within 1.0s latency SLO over a 30-day rolling window.

targets.expr: sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="1.0", route=~"/api/v1/query.*|api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30d])) / sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/api/v1/query.*|api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30d]))

panels.title: Mimir Read SLO

panels.description: Current SLO compliance for Loki write (push) path. Measures the ratio of requests completing within 0.5s latency SLO over a 30-day rolling window.

targets.expr: sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.5", route=~"/loki/api/v1/push|/api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30d])) / sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/loki/api/v1/push|/api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30d]))

panels.title: Loki Write SLO

panels.description: Current SLO compliance for Loki query path. Measures the ratio of requests completing within 2.0s latency SLO over a 30-day rolling window.

targets.expr: sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="2.0", route=~"/loki/api/v1/query.*|/api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30d])) / sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/loki/api/v1/query.*|/api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30d]))

panels.title: Loki Query SLO

panels.description: Current SLO compliance for Tempo ingest (push) path. Measures the ratio of requests completing within 0.5s latency SLO over a 30-day rolling window.

targets.expr: sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.5", route=~"/tempo.Pusher/Push|/tempopb.Pusher/Push|tempo_distributor_push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30d])) / sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/tempo.Pusher/Push|/tempopb.Pusher/Push|tempo_distributor_push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30d]))

panels.title: Tempo Ingest SLO

panels.description: Current SLO compliance for Tempo query path. Measures the ratio of requests completing within 2.0s latency SLO over a 30-day rolling window.

targets.expr: sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="2.0", route=~"/tempo.Query/Query|/tempopb.Querier/FindTraceByID|tempo_query", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30d])) / sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/tempo.Query/Query|/tempopb.Querier/FindTraceByID|tempo_query", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30d]))

panels.title: Tempo Query SLO

panels.description: Percentage of the monthly error budget remaining for Mimir write path. When this reaches 0%, the entire 30-day error budget has been consumed. Calculated as: (1 - (error_ratio / allowed_error_ratio)) * 100.

targets.expr: (1 - ((1 - (sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.5", route=~"/api/v1/push|api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30d])) / sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/api/v1/push|api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30d])))) / (1 - $slo_target))) * 100

panels.title: Mimir Write Budget

panels.description: Percentage of the monthly error budget remaining for Mimir read/query path. When this reaches 0%, the entire 30-day error budget has been consumed.

targets.expr: (1 - ((1 - (sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="1.0", route=~"/api/v1/query.*|api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30d])) / sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/api/v1/query.*|api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30d])))) / (1 - $slo_target))) * 100

panels.title: Mimir Read Budget

panels.description: Percentage of the monthly error budget remaining for Loki write (push) path. When this reaches 0%, the entire 30-day error budget has been consumed.

targets.expr: (1 - ((1 - (sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.5", route=~"/loki/api/v1/push|/api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30d])) / sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/loki/api/v1/push|/api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30d])))) / (1 - $slo_target))) * 100

panels.title: Loki Write Budget

panels.description: Percentage of the monthly error budget remaining for Loki query path. When this reaches 0%, the entire 30-day error budget has been consumed.

targets.expr: (1 - ((1 - (sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="2.0", route=~"/loki/api/v1/query.*|/api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30d])) / sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/loki/api/v1/query.*|/api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30d])))) / (1 - $slo_target))) * 100

panels.title: Loki Query Budget

panels.description: Percentage of the monthly error budget remaining for Tempo ingest (push) path. When this reaches 0%, the entire 30-day error budget has been consumed.

targets.expr: (1 - ((1 - (sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.5", route=~"/tempo.Pusher/Push|/tempopb.Pusher/Push|tempo_distributor_push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30d])) / sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/tempo.Pusher/Push|/tempopb.Pusher/Push|tempo_distributor_push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30d])))) / (1 - $slo_target))) * 100

panels.title: Tempo Ingest Budget

panels.description: Percentage of the monthly error budget remaining for Tempo query path. When this reaches 0%, the entire 30-day error budget has been consumed.

targets.expr: (1 - ((1 - (sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="2.0", route=~"/tempo.Query/Query|/tempopb.Querier/FindTraceByID|tempo_query", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30d])) / sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/tempo.Query/Query|/tempopb.Querier/FindTraceByID|tempo_query", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30d])))) / (1 - $slo_target))) * 100

panels.title: Tempo Query Budget

panels.description: Multi-window burn rate for Mimir write path. A burn rate of 1.0 means the error budget is being consumed at exactly the rate that would exhaust it by end of the SLO window. Burn rate >1 means faster consumption. Google SRE recommends alerting at 14.4x (5m), 6x (30m), 3x (1h), and 1x (6h) windows.

targets.expr: (1 - (sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.5", route=~"/api/v1/push|api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) / sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/api/v1/push|api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])))) / (1 - $slo_target)

(1 - (sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.5", route=~"/api/v1/push|api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30m])) / sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/api/v1/push|api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30m])))) / (1 - $slo_target)

(1 - (sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.5", route=~"/api/v1/push|api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h])) / sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/api/v1/push|api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h])))) / (1 - $slo_target)

(1 - (sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.5", route=~"/api/v1/push|api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[6h])) / sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/api/v1/push|api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[6h])))) / (1 - $slo_target)

panels.title: Mimir Write — Multi-Window Burn Rate

panels.description: Multi-window burn rate for Mimir read/query path. A burn rate of 1.0 means the error budget is being consumed at exactly the rate that would exhaust it by end of the SLO window.

targets.expr: (1 - (sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="1.0", route=~"/api/v1/query.*|api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) / sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/api/v1/query.*|api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])))) / (1 - $slo_target)

(1 - (sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="1.0", route=~"/api/v1/query.*|api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30m])) / sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/api/v1/query.*|api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30m])))) / (1 - $slo_target)

(1 - (sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="1.0", route=~"/api/v1/query.*|api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h])) / sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/api/v1/query.*|api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h])))) / (1 - $slo_target)

(1 - (sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="1.0", route=~"/api/v1/query.*|api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[6h])) / sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/api/v1/query.*|api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[6h])))) / (1 - $slo_target)

panels.title: Mimir Read — Multi-Window Burn Rate

panels.description: Mimir write error rate broken down by HTTP status code. Shows the proportion of 5xx responses over total requests, indicating server-side failures on the write path.

targets.expr: sum by (status_code) (rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_count{status_code=~"5..", route=~"/api/v1/push|api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) / sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_count{route=~"/api/v1/push|api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m]))

panels.title: Mimir Write Error Rate

panels.description: Percentage of Mimir write requests exceeding the 0.5s latency SLO over time. This shows how the latency budget is being consumed by slow requests.

targets.expr: 1 - (sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.5", route=~"/api/v1/push|api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) / sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/api/v1/push|api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])))

panels.title: Mimir Write Latency Budget Burn

panels.description: Multi-window burn rate for Loki write (push) path. A burn rate of 1.0 means the error budget is being consumed at the exact rate to exhaust it by the end of the SLO window. Values >1 indicate accelerated consumption.

targets.expr: (1 - (sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.5", route=~"/loki/api/v1/push|/api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) / sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/loki/api/v1/push|/api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])))) / (1 - $slo_target)

(1 - (sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.5", route=~"/loki/api/v1/push|/api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30m])) / sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/loki/api/v1/push|/api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30m])))) / (1 - $slo_target)

(1 - (sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.5", route=~"/loki/api/v1/push|/api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h])) / sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/loki/api/v1/push|/api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h])))) / (1 - $slo_target)

(1 - (sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.5", route=~"/loki/api/v1/push|/api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[6h])) / sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/loki/api/v1/push|/api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[6h])))) / (1 - $slo_target)

panels.title: Loki Write — Multi-Window Burn Rate

panels.description: Multi-window burn rate for Loki query path with 2.0s latency SLO. A burn rate of 1.0 means budget is consumed at the exact rate to exhaust it by end of window.

targets.expr: (1 - (sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="2.0", route=~"/loki/api/v1/query.*|/api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) / sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/loki/api/v1/query.*|/api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])))) / (1 - $slo_target)

(1 - (sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="2.0", route=~"/loki/api/v1/query.*|/api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30m])) / sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/loki/api/v1/query.*|/api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30m])))) / (1 - $slo_target)

(1 - (sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="2.0", route=~"/loki/api/v1/query.*|/api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h])) / sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/loki/api/v1/query.*|/api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h])))) / (1 - $slo_target)

(1 - (sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="2.0", route=~"/loki/api/v1/query.*|/api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[6h])) / sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/loki/api/v1/query.*|/api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[6h])))) / (1 - $slo_target)

panels.title: Loki Query — Multi-Window Burn Rate

panels.description: Loki error rate broken down by HTTP status code. Shows the proportion of 5xx responses over total requests across all Loki routes.

targets.expr: sum by (status_code) (rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_count{status_code=~"5..", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) / sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_count{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m]))

panels.title: Loki Error Rate

panels.description: Percentage of Loki query requests exceeding the 2.0s latency SLO over time. Shows how the latency budget is being consumed by slow queries.

targets.expr: 1 - (sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="2.0", route=~"/loki/api/v1/query.*|/api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) / sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/loki/api/v1/query.*|/api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])))

panels.title: Loki Query Latency Budget

panels.description: Multi-window burn rate for Tempo ingest (push) path with 0.5s latency SLO. Tracks error budget consumption velocity across 5m, 30m, 1h, and 6h windows.

targets.expr: (1 - (sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.5", route=~"/tempo.Pusher/Push|/tempopb.Pusher/Push|tempo_distributor_push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) / sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/tempo.Pusher/Push|/tempopb.Pusher/Push|tempo_distributor_push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])))) / (1 - $slo_target)

(1 - (sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.5", route=~"/tempo.Pusher/Push|/tempopb.Pusher/Push|tempo_distributor_push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30m])) / sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/tempo.Pusher/Push|/tempopb.Pusher/Push|tempo_distributor_push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30m])))) / (1 - $slo_target)

(1 - (sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.5", route=~"/tempo.Pusher/Push|/tempopb.Pusher/Push|tempo_distributor_push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h])) / sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/tempo.Pusher/Push|/tempopb.Pusher/Push|tempo_distributor_push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h])))) / (1 - $slo_target)

(1 - (sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.5", route=~"/tempo.Pusher/Push|/tempopb.Pusher/Push|tempo_distributor_push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[6h])) / sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/tempo.Pusher/Push|/tempopb.Pusher/Push|tempo_distributor_push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[6h])))) / (1 - $slo_target)

panels.title: Tempo Ingest — Multi-Window Burn Rate

panels.description: Multi-window burn rate for Tempo query path with 2.0s latency SLO. Tracks error budget consumption velocity across 5m, 30m, 1h, and 6h windows.

targets.expr: (1 - (sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="2.0", route=~"/tempo.Query/Query|/tempopb.Querier/FindTraceByID|tempo_query", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) / sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/tempo.Query/Query|/tempopb.Querier/FindTraceByID|tempo_query", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])))) / (1 - $slo_target)

(1 - (sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="2.0", route=~"/tempo.Query/Query|/tempopb.Querier/FindTraceByID|tempo_query", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30m])) / sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/tempo.Query/Query|/tempopb.Querier/FindTraceByID|tempo_query", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[30m])))) / (1 - $slo_target)

(1 - (sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="2.0", route=~"/tempo.Query/Query|/tempopb.Querier/FindTraceByID|tempo_query", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h])) / sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/tempo.Query/Query|/tempopb.Querier/FindTraceByID|tempo_query", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h])))) / (1 - $slo_target)

(1 - (sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="2.0", route=~"/tempo.Query/Query|/tempopb.Querier/FindTraceByID|tempo_query", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[6h])) / sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/tempo.Query/Query|/tempopb.Querier/FindTraceByID|tempo_query", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[6h])))) / (1 - $slo_target)

panels.title: Tempo Query — Multi-Window Burn Rate

panels.description: Rolling 30-day SLO compliance for all services overlaid on a single chart. The horizontal threshold line represents the configured SLO target. Services below the line are breaching their SLO.

targets.expr: sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.5", route=~"/api/v1/push|api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h])) / sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/api/v1/push|api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h]))

sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="1.0", route=~"/api/v1/query.*|api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h])) / sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/api/v1/query.*|api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h]))

sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.5", route=~"/loki/api/v1/push|/api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h])) / sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/loki/api/v1/push|/api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h]))

sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="2.0", route=~"/loki/api/v1/query.*|/api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h])) / sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/loki/api/v1/query.*|/api/prom/query.*", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h]))

panels.title: SLO Report Card

panels.description: Overlay of combined service error rates with deployment annotations. Use this to correlate error spikes with recent deployments or restarts. Orange annotations indicate process restarts detected via process_start_time_seconds changes.
